description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script installing python-catkin-tools, build-essential, libeigen3-dev, creates a ~/workspace/src directory and symlinks the srrg_hbst source. Define a single stage wash_and_dry and four jobs. In the ubuntu_16_04_ros_kinetic_debug job (image osrf/ros:kinetic-desktop-full-xenial) run apt install libqglviewer-dev -y, catkin build srrg_hbst -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=DEBUG, catkin build srrg_hbst --catkin-make-args tests, then execute /root/workspace/devel/lib/srrg_hbst/test_search, test_search_merging, test_streaming and test_streaming_merging. In the ubuntu_16_04_ros_kinetic_release job (same image) run apt install libqglviewer-dev -y, catkin build srrg_hbst, catkin build srrg_hbst --catkin-make-args tests, and the same four test binaries. In the ubuntu_18_04_ros_melodic_debug job (image osrf/ros:melodic-desktop-full-bionic) run apt install libqglviewer-dev-qt5 -y, catkin build srrg_hbst -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=DEBUG, catkin build srrg_hbst --catkin-make-args tests, followed by the four test binaries. In the ubuntu_18_04_ros_melodic_release job (same image) run apt install libqglviewer-dev-qt5 -y, catkin build srrg_hbst, catkin build srrg_hbst --catkin-make-args tests, and the same four test binaries.
